stemHtml: A vertically-mounted dipole antenna is used for RF transmissions. The receiving antenna has to be..

options.a: aligned horizontally in order to receive the electrical field of the RF transmission in horizontal plane.
options.b: in the same vertical alignment in order to receive the electrical field of the RF transmission in the vertical plane.
options.c: aligned horizontally in order to receive the electrical field of the RF transmission in vertical plane.
options.d: in the same vertical alignment in order to receive the electrical field of the RF transmission in the horizontal plane.
